notes: Looked over the 50 processors. 48 are perfect. Unit #12 has a deep scratch across the heat spreader (cosmetic, severity 2). Unit #44 failed the impedance check completely and is a dead board (electrical, severity 5).
Inspected the wiring harnesses. Out of 20, they all passed connectivity tests. However, the bag was missing 2 of the expected grounding screws. Otherwise good.
